title: Proven Results Across Industries
description: See how leading companies transformed their database operations with KubeDB

case_studies.challenge: MongoDB Atlas costs equal to entire 20-node Kubernetes cluster on Hetzner Cloud
case_studies.solution: Migrated to self-managed MongoDB using KubeDB operator with Stash backup solution
case_studies.quote: We saved around 90% of our costs and improved performance by keeping traffic inside Kubernetes.
case_studies.author: Volodymyr Lysetskyy

case_studies.challenge: Legacy monolithic applications with manual database operations, slow deployments, and limited scalability
case_studies.solution: Cloud-native transformation with KubeDB on Rancher, custom UI extension for self-service database provisioning
case_studies.quote: Successfully transitioned from monolithic infrastructure to cloud-native microservices with automated database operations.
case_studies.author: Infrastructure Team

case_studies.challenge: Need to launch a white-label DBaaS platform to serve 20,000+ business customers across multiple industries
case_studies.solution: Deployed KubeDB on Suse Rancher with ACE UI, supporting 10 database engines in 2 cloud regions
case_studies.quote: Launched production-ready DBaaS platform in just 3-4 months with full automation and enterprise-grade features.
case_studies.author: Platform Team
